---
title: "The Extended Dynamic Mode Decomposition"
author:
  - name: David Jordan
    url: mailto:public@livingphysics.org
date: "2025-04-29"
categories: ["Observable Functions", "Projection", "Koopman Operator", "EDMD"]
code-fold: true
draft: true
feed:
  image-height: 60
  image-width: 60
---
This is a note that outlines my own personal understanding of the DMD and EDMD methods in the context of observable function dynamics and projections.
